title: centaurea beatica
intro: Centaurea beatica, also known as the bitter centaury, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea beatica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Centaurea beatica can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
